mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_t (order_id, m_id, total_amount, status, points_used) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{mId}, #{totalAmount}, 'READY', #{pointsUsed})
INSERT INTO order_item_t (order_id, menu_name, temperature, size, quantity, unit_price, subtotal) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{menuName}, #{temperature}, #{size}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{subtotal})
mapper.update: UPDATE order_t SET status = 'PAID', payment_key = #{paymentKey}, paid_date = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, m_id AS mId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, payment_key AS paymentKey, reg_date AS regDate, paid_date AS paidDate, cancel_reason AS cancelReason, cancel_memo AS cancelMemo, cancel_date AS cancelDate, refund_amount AS refundAmount, refund_rate AS refundRate, points_used AS pointsUsed, points_earned AS pointsEarned FROM order_t WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT order_id AS orderId, m_id AS mId, total_amount AS totalAmount, status, payment_key AS paymentKey, reg_date AS regDate, paid_date AS paidDate, cancel_reason AS cancelReason, cancel_memo AS cancelMemo, cancel_date AS cancelDate, refund_amount AS refundAmount, refund_rate AS refundRate, points_used AS pointsUsed, points_earned AS pointsEarned FROM order_t WHERE m_id = #{mId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.m_id AS mId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status, o.payment_key AS paymentKey, o.reg_date AS regDate, o.paid_date AS paidDate, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.cancel_memo AS cancelMemo, o.cancel_date AS cancelDate, o.refund_amount AS refundAmount, o.refund_rate AS refundRate, o.points_used AS pointsUsed, o.points_earned AS pointsEarned, (SELECT menu_name FROM order_item_t WHERE order_id = o.order_id ORDER BY oi_idx LIMIT 1) AS firstMenuName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_item_t WHERE order_id = o.order_id) AS itemCount FROM order_t o WHERE o.m_id = #{mId} ORDER BY o.reg_date DESC LIMIT ${limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_t SET points_earned = #{amount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE order_t SET points_used = #{amount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT oi_idx AS oiIdx, order_id AS orderId, menu_name AS menuName, temperature, size, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, subtotal FROM order_item_t WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
